games.title: Leaves in a Garden
games.description: Protect your potted plants and trade resources as a full-time gardener! An entry for Thailand Summer Jam 2026 - Won 71st place (Out of 133 entries.)

games.title: Project Rahu
games.description: In the year 22XX, as Earth neared collapse, nations turned to space in a desperate race for survival. Fates were forever changed when a crew of astro-biologists embarked on a mission upon an alien asteroid.

games.title: Casket in Lembuh
games.description: A detective investigates a murder mystery on a remote (fictional) Indonesian Island.

games.title: Swapstack
games.description: Cute math game where you combine little animals and see numbers increase. Perfect for kids!

games.title: Honor & Fantasy: Heroes
games.description: The kingdom is at war! As a Hero, cast spells, support allies, and summon troops to turn the tide in a three-lane clash against the enemy. Destroy their base before they destroys yours!

games.title: Tad Bit
games.description: You are a cursed prince trapped in the form of a frog. Your only hope for breaking the curse lies in ascending through dangerous levels, each one more difficult than the last.

games.title: Burbur's Blimp
games.description: Burbur is a Pilot. Burbur pilots a Blimp. He tries to collect fruits called Burbur Fruits. Help Burbur repair his rocket through trading, collecting fruits and more! An entry for GMTK Game Jam 2024 - Won 6712th place (Out of 7526 entries.)

games.title: Nelly's Supply Store
games.description: A chill and simple game where you manage a store on a beach. Your job is to help Nelly sell the items in her shop over the course of the summer. An entry for Strawberry Jam #2 - Won 1st place (Out of 4 entries.)

games.title: Skywars
games.description: A roguelike 2.5D game set in Mahidol University International College. It focuses on gamified exaggerations of the daily lives of Creative Technology Major students and the "academic anarchy" within the campus.

games.title: Guardians & Corruptors
games.description: Guardians must vanquish all five towers behind enemy lines, while Corruptors aim to reach the land behind the Holy Protection.

websites.title: nottherealgun.github.io
websites.description: It's this website! A personal portfolio and hobby website where I pour in all my love and passion for web development.

software.title: VN Editor
software.description: A custom editor, built as a production tool for making my unannounced visual novel game project.
